name: Thai Noodles
recipeInstructions:
(Vegetarian or regular Worcestershire sauce, as you prefer.)
1. Saute cabbage and onion in oil until just softened. Set aside in a large bowl.
2. Cook pasta until al dente. While the pasta is cooking, mix together the next 9 ingredients in a saucepan.
3. Heat gently, gradually adding coconut milk. Do not boil.
4. Mix the cooked pasta with the sauce and vegetables.
5. Add cilantro and basil. Serve immediately.
4-6 main dish servings. This is a heavy dish; serve with a steamed vegetable and/or a light green salad.
